query: SELECT id, openId, name, email, role, subscriptionTier, subscriptionStatus, onboardingComplete, onboardingStage, icpGeneratedCount, adCopyGeneratedCount, emailSeqGeneratedCount, whatsappSeqGeneratedCount, landingPageGeneratedCount, offerGeneratedCount, hvcoGeneratedCount, heroMechanismGeneratedCount, headlineGeneratedCount, powerMode, dismissedWelcomeBanner, activityStreak FROM users WHERE role = 'admin' OR role = 'superuser' ORDER BY id LIMIT 5;
